summary: Iteration 35 - Testing auto-generate bilans and course salary generation features. ALL TESTS PASSED. 9/9 backend tests passed. Frontend UI tests passed for AnnualReviewsPage (Bilans/Suivis) and CoursesPage.

auto_generate_bilans.api_response: Returns {message, created} with count of bilans generated
auto_generate_bilans.ui_button: PASS - 'Générer bilans mensuels' button found on /annual-reviews page
auto_generate_bilans.ui_click: PASS - Button click triggers API and shows success toast
auto_generate_bilans.data_creation: PASS - New bilans created for active non-challenge members

course_creation_instructor_field.instructor_field: PASS - Course created with 'instructor' field (not instructor_name)
course_creation_instructor_field.ui_modal: PASS - Add course modal shows COACH dropdown with coach names
course_creation_instructor_field.coach_dropdown: PASS - Shows coaches from /api/coaches with names (Coach Alex, Coach Julie, Coach Marc)

salary_generation.instructor_lookup: PASS - Uses 'instructor' field to look up coach hourly_rate
salary_generation.coach_id_fallback: PASS - Backend has fallback to coach_id if instructor is empty (lines 205-209)
salary_generation.ui_button: PASS - 'Générer dépenses salaires coachs' button visible when courses.length > 0

test_results.resize_observer_errors: PASS - No ResizeObserver errors detected during any interactions

seed_data_creation: Created temporary TEST_ coaches and courses for salary generation tests, then cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 35 features verified working: 1) Auto-generate bilans button on AnnualReviewsPage (/annual-reviews) triggers POST /api/challenges/auto-generate-bilans, 2) CoursesPage form sends 'instructor' field (not instructor_name) when creating courses, 3) Salary generation at POST /api/courses/generate-salary-expenses/{year}/{month} correctly uses instructor field + coach hourly_rate, 4) Generate salary button only appears when courses exist for the month. Existing data: Dec 2024 has 8 courses with coaches Coach Alex, Coach Julie, Coach Marc.
